contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT.WildCat Require Import Core Equiv.

(** A congruence on a group is a relation satisfying [R x x' -> R y y' -> R (x * y) (x' * y')].  Because we also require that [R] is reflexive, we also know that [R y y' -> R (x * y) (x * y')] for any [x], and similarly for multiplication on the right by [x].  We don't need to assume that [R] is symmetric or transitive. *)
Context {G : Group} {R : Relation G} `{!IsCongruence R, !Reflexive R}.
(** The type underlying the quotient group is [Quotient R]. *)

goals.conclusion: forall a a' b : G, R a a' -> ?dclass a b = ?dclass a' b
forall a b b' : G, R b b' -> ?dclass a b = ?dclass a b'

forall a a' b : G,
R a a' ->
(fun x y : G => class_of R (x * y)) a b =
(fun x y : G => class_of R (x * y)) a' b

(fun x0 y0 : G => class_of R (x0 * y0)) x y =
(fun x0 y0 : G => class_of R (x0 * y0)) x' y

forall a b b' : G,
R b b' ->
(fun x y : G => class_of R (x * y)) a b =
(fun x y : G => class_of R (x * y)) a b'

(fun x0 y0 : G => class_of R (x0 * y0)) x y =
(fun x0 y0 : G => class_of R (x0 * y0)) x y'
forall a b : G, R a b -> ?pclass a = ?pclass b
forall a b : G, R a b -> (class_of R o inv) a = (class_of R o inv) b

contents: intros x y p; cbn beta.

goals.conclusion: class_of R x^ = class_of R y^
class_of R x^ = class_of R (y^ * (y * x^))
class_of R (y^ * (y * x^)) = class_of R y^
class_of R x^ = class_of R (y^ * (y * x^))
class_of R x^ = class_of R (y^ * y * x^)
class_of R x^ = class_of R (1 * x^)
class_of R x^ = class_of R x^
class_of R (y^ * (y * x^)) = class_of R y^
class_of R (y^ * (y * x^)) = class_of R (y^ * (x * x^))
class_of R (y^ * (x * x^)) = class_of R y^
class_of R (y^ * (y * x^)) = class_of R (y^ * (x * x^))

contents: symmetry; apply qglue; repeat apply iscong.

goals.conclusion: class_of R (y^ * (x * x^)) = class_of R y^
class_of R y^ = class_of R y^

contents: srapply Quotient_ind3_hprop; intros x y z.

goals.conclusion:
(fun x0 y0 z0 : G / R =>
 congquot_sgop x0 (congquot_sgop y0 z0) =
 congquot_sgop (congquot_sgop x0 y0) z0) (class_of R x) 
  (class_of R y) (class_of R z)
(fun x0 : G / R => 1 * x0 = x0) (class_of R x)
(fun x0 : G / R => x0 * 1 = x0) (class_of R x)

contents: srapply Quotient_ind_hprop; intro x; cbn beta.
srapply Quotient_ind_hprop; intro x; cbn beta.

(** TODO: Way too many universes, needs fixing *)
  (** The set of left cosets of a finite subgroup of a finite group is finite. *)

#[export] Instance finite_leftcoset `{Univalence, Finite G, Finite H}
    : Finite LeftCoset.

goals.conclusion: forall x y : G, Decidable (in_cosetL H x y)
forall x y : G, Decidable (in_cosetL H x y)

contents: (** The index of a subgroup is the number of cosets of the subgroup. *)

Definition subgroup_index `{Univalence, Finite G, Finite H} : nat
    := fcard LeftCoset.
(** The set of left cosets is equivalent to the set of right coset. *)

goals.conclusion: forall a b : G, in_cosetL H a b <-> in_cosetR H (?f a) (?f b)
forall a b : G, in_cosetL H a b <-> in_cosetR H a^ b^

contents: (** The set of right cosets of a finite subgroup of a finite group is finite since it is equivalent to the set of left cosets. *)

#[export] Instance finite_rightcoset `{Univalence, Finite G, Finite H}
    : Finite RightCoset.

(** ** Quotient groups *)

(** Now we can define the quotient group by a normal subgroup. *)

goals.conclusion:
forall x x' y y' : G,
in_cosetL N x x' -> in_cosetL N y y' -> in_cosetL N (x * y) (x' * y')

forall x x' y y' : G,
in_cosetR N x x' -> in_cosetR N y y' -> in_cosetR N (x * y) (x' * y')

contents: (** Now we have to make a choice whether to pick the left or right cosets. Due to existing convention we shall pick left cosets but we note that we could equally have picked right. *)

Definition QuotientGroup : Group
    := Build_Group (LeftCoset G N) _ _ _ _.

Definition grp_quotient_rec {A : Group} (f : G $-> A)
             (h : forall n : G, N n -> f n = mon_unit)
    : QuotientGroup $-> A.

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1
forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1
forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1
forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1
forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1
forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1

goals.conclusion: forall a b : G, in_cosetL N a b -> ?pclass a = ?pclass b

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1
forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1

goals.conclusion: forall a b : G, in_cosetL N a b -> f a = f b

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1
forall n0 : G, N n0 -> f n0 = 1
forall n0 : G, N n0 -> f n0 = 1
forall n0 : G, N n0 -> f n0 = 1
forall n0 : G, N n0 -> f n0 = 1

goals.conclusion:
IsSemiGroupPreserving
  (Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
     ((fun (x y : G) (n : N (x^ * y)) =>
       let X := equiv_fun grp_moveR_M1 in
       X
         (((h (inv x * y) n)^ @ grp_homo_op f (inv x) y) @
          ap (fun y0 : A => y0 * f y) (grp_homo_inv f x)))
      :
      forall a b : G, in_cosetL N a b -> f a = f b))

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1

goals.conclusion:
forall y : QuotientGroup,
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
  (fun (x0 y0 : G) (n : N (x0^ * y0)) =>
   let X := equiv_fun grp_moveR_M1 in
   X
     (((h (inv x0 * y0) n)^ @ grp_homo_op f (inv x0) y0) @
      ap (fun y1 : A => y1 * f y0) (grp_homo_inv f x0)))
  (x * y) =
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
  (fun (x0 y0 : G) (n : N (x0^ * y0)) =>
   let X := equiv_fun grp_moveR_M1 in
   X
     (((h (inv x0 * y0) n)^ @ grp_homo_op f (inv x0) y0) @
      ap (fun y1 : A => y1 * f y0) (grp_homo_inv f x0)))
  x *
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
  (fun (x0 y0 : G) (n : N (x0^ * y0)) =>
   let X := equiv_fun grp_moveR_M1 in
   X
     (((h (inv x0 * y0) n)^ @ grp_homo_op f (inv x0) y0) @
      ap (fun y1 : A => y1 * f y0) (grp_homo_inv f x0)))
  y

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1

goals.conclusion:
forall a : G,
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
  (fun (x0 y : G) (n : N (x0^ * y)) =>
   let X := equiv_fun grp_moveR_M1 in
   X
     (((h (inv x0 * y) n)^ @ grp_homo_op f (inv x0) y) @
      ap (fun y0 : A => y0 * f y) (grp_homo_inv f x0)))
  (x * class_of (in_cosetL N) a) =
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
  (fun (x0 y : G) (n : N (x0^ * y)) =>
   let X := equiv_fun grp_moveR_M1 in
   X
     (((h (inv x0 * y) n)^ @ grp_homo_op f (inv x0) y) @

  x *
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
  (fun (x0 y : G) (n : N (x0^ * y)) =>
   let X := equiv_fun grp_moveR_M1 in
   X
     (((h (inv x0 * y) n)^ @ grp_homo_op f (inv x0) y) @
      ap (fun y0 : A => y0 * f y) (grp_homo_inv f x0)))
  (class_of (in_cosetL N) a)

goals.conclusion:
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
  (fun (x0 y0 : G) (n : N (x0^ * y0)) =>
   let X := equiv_fun grp_moveR_M1 in
   X

  (x * class_of (in_cosetL N) y) =
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f

   X

Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f

   X

goals.conclusion:
forall x : QuotientGroup,
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
  (fun (x0 y0 : G) (n : N (x0^ * y0)) =>

goals.conclusion:
forall a : G,
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f
  (fun (x y0 : G) (n : N (x^ * y0)) =>
   let X := equiv_fun grp_moveR_M1 in

  (class_of (in_cosetL N) a * class_of (in_cosetL N) y) =
Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f

Quotient_rec (in_cosetL N) A f

goals.conclusion: f (x * y) = f x * f y

contents:
Definition grp_quotient_ind_hprop (P : QuotientGroup -> Type)
    `{forall x, IsHProp (P x)}
    (H1 : forall x, P (grp_quotient_map x))
    : forall x, P x.

goals.conclusion: forall a : G, P (class_of (in_cosetL N) a)

contents: Arguments QuotientGroup G N : simpl never.
(** Rephrasing that lets you specify the normality proof *)

Definition QuotientGroup' (G : Group) (N : Subgroup G) (H : IsNormalSubgroup N)
  := QuotientGroup G (Build_NormalSubgroup G N H).

Corollary grp_quotient_rec_beta `{F : Funext} {G : Group}
          (N : NormalSubgroup G) (H : Group)
          {A : Group} (f : G $-> A)
          (h : forall n:G, N n -> f n = mon_unit)
  : (grp_quotient_rec G N f h) $o grp_quotient_map = f.

goals.conclusion: grp_quotient_rec G N f h $o grp_quotient_map = f

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1

goals.conclusion: grp_quotient_rec G N f h $o grp_quotient_map = f

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1

contents:
Definition grp_quotient_rec_beta' {G : Group}
          (N : NormalSubgroup G) (H : Group)
          {A : Group} (f : G $-> A)
          (h : forall n:G, N n -> f n = mon_unit)
  : (grp_quotient_rec G N f h) $o grp_quotient_map == f
    := fun _ => idpath.
(** The proof of normality is irrelevant up to equivalence. It is unfortunate that it doesn't hold definitionally. *)

goals.conclusion: QuotientGroup' G H k ≅ QuotientGroup' G H k'
QuotientGroup' G H k ≅ QuotientGroup' G H k'
QuotientGroup' G H k <~> QuotientGroup' G H k'
forall y : QuotientGroup' G H k, 1%equiv (x * y) = 1%equiv x * 1%equiv y

contents: srapply Quotient_ind_hprop; intro y; revert x.

goals.conclusion:
forall x : QuotientGroup' G H k,
(fun
   x0 : Quotient
          (in_cosetL
             {| normalsubgroup_subgroup := H; normalsubgroup_isnormal := k |}) =>
 1%equiv (x * x0) = 1%equiv x * 1%equiv x0)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {| normalsubgroup_subgroup := H; normalsubgroup_isnormal := k |})
     y)

(fun
   x0 : Quotient
          (in_cosetL
             {| normalsubgroup_subgroup := H; normalsubgroup_isnormal := k |}) =>
 (fun
    x1 : Quotient
           (in_cosetL
              {|
                normalsubgroup_subgroup := H; normalsubgroup_isnormal := k
              |}) =>
  1%equiv (x0 * x1) = 1%equiv x0 * 1%equiv x1)
   (class_of
      (in_cosetL
         {| normalsubgroup_subgroup := H; normalsubgroup_isnormal := k |})
      y))
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {| normalsubgroup_subgroup := H; normalsubgroup_isnormal := k |})
     x)

contents: (** The quotient map is trivial on the normal subgroup. *)

Definition grp_quotient_map_trivial {G : Group} (N : NormalSubgroup G)
  (n : G) (inN : N n)
  : grp_quotient_map (N:=N) n = 1.
(** The universal mapping property for groups *)

goals.conclusion: {f : G $-> H & forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1} <~> (G / N $-> H)
{f : G $-> H & forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1} <~> (G / N $-> H)
{f : G $-> H & forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1} -> G / N $-> H
(G / N $-> H) -> {f : G $-> H & forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1}
{f : G $-> H & forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1} -> G / N $-> H

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1

goals.conclusion: (G / N $-> H) -> {f : G $-> H & forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1}
{f0 : G $-> H & forall n : G, N n -> f0 n = 1}
forall n : G, N n -> (f $o grp_quotient_map) n = 1

(fun X : {f : G $-> H & forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1} =>
 (fun (f : G $-> H) (p : forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1) =>
  grp_quotient_rec G N f p) X.1 X.2)
o (fun f : G / N $-> H =>
   (f $o grp_quotient_map;
   fun (n : G) (h : N n) =>
   ap f (grp_quotient_map_trivial N n h) @ grp_homo_unit f)) ==
idmap

grp_quotient_rec G N (f $o grp_quotient_map)
  (fun (n : G) (h : N n) =>
   ap f (grp_quotient_map_trivial N n h) @ grp_homo_unit f) =
f

grp_quotient_rec G N (f $o grp_quotient_map)
  (fun (n : G) (h : N n) =>
   ap f (grp_quotient_map_trivial N n h) @ grp_homo_unit f) ==
f

(fun f : G / N $-> H =>
 (f $o grp_quotient_map;
 fun (n : G) (h : N n) =>
 ap f (grp_quotient_map_trivial N n h) @ grp_homo_unit f))
o (fun X : {f : G $-> H & forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1} =>
   (fun (f : G $-> H) (p : forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1) =>
    grp_quotient_rec G N f p) X.1 X.2) ==
idmap

(grp_quotient_rec G N f p $o grp_quotient_map;
fun (n : G) (h : N n) =>
ap (grp_quotient_rec G N f p) (grp_quotient_map_trivial N n h) @
grp_homo_unit (grp_quotient_rec G N f p)) = (f; p)

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1

goals.conclusion: grp_homo_compose (grp_quotient_rec G N f p) grp_quotient_map = f

hypotheses.type: forall n : G, N n -> f n = 1

contents: (** First we define a map from the quotient by the kernel of phi into the image of phi *)

Definition grp_image_quotient
    : A / grp_kernel phi $-> grp_image phi.

goals.conclusion: forall n : A, grp_kernel phi n -> ?f n = 1
forall n : A, grp_kernel phi n -> grp_homo_image_in phi n = 1

contents: (** The underlying map of this homomorphism is an equivalence *)

goals.conclusion:
forall a b : A,
(fun x y : Quotient (in_cosetL (grp_kernel phi)) =>
 grp_image_quotient x = grp_image_quotient y -> x = y)
  (class_of (in_cosetL (grp_kernel phi)) a)
  (class_of (in_cosetL (grp_kernel phi)) b)

contents: intros x y h; simpl in h.

goals.conclusion:
class_of (in_cosetL (grp_kernel phi)) x =
class_of (in_cosetL (grp_kernel phi)) y

hypotheses.type: (phi x; grp_image_in phi x) = (phi y; grp_image_in phi y)
(phi x; grp_image_in phi x) = (phi y; grp_image_in phi y)

contents: apply (equiv_path_sigma_hprop _ _)^-1%equiv in h; cbn in h.
Theorem grp_first_iso : A / grp_kernel phi ≅ grp_image phi.

(** Quotient groups are finite. *)
(** Note that we cannot constructively conclude that the normal subgroup [H] must be finite since [G] is, therefore we keep it as an assumption. *)

Instance finite_quotientgroup {U : Univalence} (G : Group) (H : NormalSubgroup G)
  (fin_G : Finite G) (fin_H : Finite H)
  : Finite (QuotientGroup G H).

goals.conclusion: forall x y : G, Decidable (in_cosetL H x y)
forall x y : G, Decidable (in_cosetL H x y)

contents:
Definition grp_kernel_quotient_iso `{Univalence} {G : Group} (N : NormalSubgroup G)
  : GroupIsomorphism N (grp_kernel (@grp_quotient_map G N)).

goals.conclusion:
IsEquiv
  (grp_kernel_corec (subgroup_incl N)
     ((fun x : N => grp_quotient_map_trivial N (subgroup_incl N x) x.2)
      :
      grp_quotient_map $o subgroup_incl N == grp_homo_const))

IsConnMap (Tr (-1))
  (grp_kernel_corec (subgroup_incl N)
     (fun x : N => grp_quotient_map_trivial N (subgroup_incl N x) x.2))

IsEmbedding
  (grp_kernel_corec (subgroup_incl N)
     (fun x : N => grp_quotient_map_trivial N (subgroup_incl N x) x.2))

IsConnMap (Tr (-1))
  (grp_kernel_corec (subgroup_incl N)
     (fun x : N => grp_quotient_map_trivial N (subgroup_incl N x) x.2))

IsConnected (Tr (-1))
  (hfiber
     (grp_kernel_corec (subgroup_incl N)
        (fun x : N => grp_quotient_map_trivial N (subgroup_incl N x) x.2))
     (g; p))

Tr (-1)
  (hfiber
     (grp_kernel_corec (subgroup_incl N)
        (fun x : N => grp_quotient_map_trivial N (subgroup_incl N x) x.2))
     (g; p))

(fun x : N =>
 grp_kernel_corec (subgroup_incl N)
   (fun x0 : N => grp_quotient_map_trivial N (subgroup_incl N x0) x0.2) x =
 (g; p)) (g; ?proj2)

class_of (fun x y : G => N (x^ * y)) 1 =
class_of (fun x y : G => N (x^ * y)) g

(fun x : N =>
 grp_kernel_corec (subgroup_incl N)
   (fun x0 : N => grp_quotient_map_trivial N (subgroup_incl N x0) x0.2) x =
 (g; p))
  (g;
  internal_paths_rew N
    (internal_paths_rew (fun g0 : G => N (g0 * g))
       (related_quotient_paths (fun x y : G => N (x^ * y)) 1 g p^)
       inverse_mon_unit)
    (grp_unit_l g))

(grp_kernel_corec (subgroup_incl N)
   (fun x : N => grp_quotient_map_trivial N (subgroup_incl N x) x.2)
   (g;
   internal_paths_rew N
     (internal_paths_rew (fun g0 : G => N (g0 * g))
        (related_quotient_paths (fun x y : G => N (x^ * y)) 1 g p^)
        inverse_mon_unit)
     (grp_unit_l g))).1 =
(g; p).1

contents: (** When the normal subgroup [N] is trivial, the inclusion map [G $-> G / N] is an isomorphism. *)

Instance catie_grp_quotient_map_trivial {G : Group} (N : NormalSubgroup G)
  (triv : IsTrivialGroup N)
  : CatIsEquiv (@grp_quotient_map G N).

goals.conclusion: forall n : G, N n -> Id G n = 1
grp_quotient_map $o grp_quotient_rec G N (Id G) triv $== Id (G / N)
grp_quotient_rec G N (Id G) triv $o grp_quotient_map $== Id G

contents: (** The group quotient by a trivial group is isomorphic to the original group. *)

Definition grp_quotient_trivial (G : Group) (N : NormalSubgroup G)
  (triv : IsTrivialGroup N)
  : G $<~> G / N
  := Build_CatEquiv grp_quotient_map.
(** A quotient by a maximal subgroup is trivial. *)

Instance istrivial_grp_quotient_maximal
  (G : Group) (N : NormalSubgroup G)
  : IsMaximalSubgroup N -> IsTrivialGroup (G / N).

goals.conclusion: forall x : G / N, trivial_subgroup (G / N) x
forall x : G, trivial_subgroup (G / N) (grp_quotient_map x)

contents: (** Conversely, a trivial quotient means the subgroup is maximal.  First a version where we only assume that the quotient map is trivial. *)

Definition ismaximalsubgroup_istrivial_grp_quotient_map `{Univalence}
  (G : Group) (N : NormalSubgroup G)
  (triv : forall x, grp_quotient_map (N:=N) x = 1)
  : IsMaximalSubgroup N.

Definition ismaximalsubgroup_istrivial_grp_quotient `{Univalence}
  (G : Group) (N : NormalSubgroup G)
  (triv : IsTrivialGroup (G / N))
  : IsMaximalSubgroup N.
